name: mast-validation
description: End-to-end validation: invoke MAST_unit's own MastrometryDotNet solver class against C:\MAST\full-frame.fits using the unit's venv. Confirms the full plate-solving chain works through production code paths (venv, MAST_common imports, Filer/RAM disk, astrometry binaries, indexes). HARD FAILS (no skip) if the index image or smoke FITS are not staged/mounted -- a run without a real end-to-end solve is not valid.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\mast-validation-verify.log'; ${smoke}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\mast-validation-smoke.txt'; if (-not (Test-Path $smoke)) { 'smoke marker missing' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }; ${body}=Get-Content $smoke -Raw; if ($body -match 'mastrometry_ok') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value $body } else { ('unexpected smoke body: ' + $body) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
